name: GitHub, Star Growth
description: Cumulative star-count curve for a single repo, headline shows the current total. Pulls per-stargazer timestamps via the GitHub stargazers endpoint (custom Accept header) and resamples them into the chosen window (30 / 90 / 365 days). Reaches up to 4000 stargazers to keep the response tight; older history is approximated as a single anchor point. Public repos work without a token, large repos benefit hugely from one.
